data.title: Create preconditions-validator-lib.sh with _dso_pv_entry_check and _dso_pv_exit_write
data.description:
## Testing Mode
GREEN

## Overview
Implement the shared validator helper library that all four stage-boundary validators will source. Must make T1's RED tests pass. Library lives in plugins/dso/hooks/lib/ to match existing lib conventions.

## File Impact
- Create: plugins/dso/hooks/lib/preconditions-validator-lib.sh

## Implementation Notes
The library must use _PLUGIN_ROOT (resolved via BASH_SOURCE / readlink) — never hardcode plugins/dso/. It sources Story 1's read/write helpers (to be provided by a96b-7ba8) for PRECONDITIONS event I/O.

Functions to implement:

**_dso_pv_entry_check(stage_name, upstream_stage_name, ticket_id)**
- Reads the latest PRECONDITIONS event for upstream_stage_name via _read_latest_preconditions (from Story 1)
- Validates only minimal-tier fields (spec_hash, gate_verdicts, workflow_completion_checklist, completeness) — depth-agnostic: ignores unknown fields (standard/deep extras silently pass)
- On missing event: emits diagnostic to stderr, returns exit 1
- On schema-invalid event (missing required minimal fields, malformed JSON): emits diagnostic to stderr, returns exit 1
- On unknown-only fields (valid minimal fields present, extras ignored): returns exit 0
- ZERO user interaction: no prompts, no reads from stdin

**_dso_pv_exit_write(stage_name, upstream_event_id, spec_hash, ticket_id)**
- Writes a new PRECONDITIONS event via Story 1's writer (flat <ts>-<uuid>-PRECONDITIONS.json)
- Sets upstream_event_id field for cross-stage chain linking (SC11 self-verification)
- Runs schema-roundtrip self-check: re-reads the just-written event and validates it; returns exit 1 if roundtrip fails
- Returns exit 0 on success

## Pattern Reference
# from plugins/dso/hooks/lib/hook-error-handler.sh — source guard pattern
_PLUGIN_ROOT_VALIDATOR="$(cd "$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")" && pwd)"
# Use _PLUGIN_ROOT_VALIDATOR (not a hardcoded path) throughout the library

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] File plugins/dso/hooks/lib/preconditions-validator-lib.sh exists and is executable
  Verify: test -x $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/hooks/lib/preconditions-validator-lib.sh
- [ ] All 6 tests from T1 PASS after implementation
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/hooks/test-preconditions-validator-lib.sh 2>&1 | grep -q "All tests passed\|PASS"
- [ ] No hardcoded plugins/dso/ path in the new file (uses _PLUGIN_ROOT pattern)
  Verify: ! grep -q 'plugins/dso/' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/hooks/lib/preconditions-validator-lib.sh
- [ ] check-plugin-self-ref.sh pre-commit hook passes (no literal plugins/dso/ refs)
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/check-plugin-self-ref.sh 2>&1 | grep -v "^$" | grep -v "OK\|ok\|pass" | wc -l | awk '{exit ($1 > 0)}'
- [ ] validate.sh --ci passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/validate.sh --ci

## Retry Budget
MAX_ATTEMPTS: 3 (sonnet model)
On 3 consecutive sonnet failures: escalate to opus with full diagnostic context (all 3 failure messages)
On 3 consecutive opus failures (6 total): escalate to user with full failure history
If MAX_AGENTS: 0 at sonnet→opus escalation time: skip opus step, escalate to user immediately
